settings.title: Repaint Detection
settings.description: Resprayed panels glow differently from factory paint. Even perfect color matches can't fool UV — every repainted door, bonnet, or bumper shows up clearly.

settings.title: Paint Fading
settings.description: UV-faded clear coat shows distinct patterns under UV light before fade becomes visible in daylight.

settings.title: Hidden Rust
settings.description: Rust forming under paint shows as dark discoloration under UV — invisible until it breaks through the surface.

settings.title: Body Filler (Putty)
settings.description: Filler used in dent and accident repairs glows brightly under UV — exposing exactly where putty was applied.

settings.title: Moisture / Flood Damage
settings.description: Water trapped between paint layers creates distinct UV patterns. Essential for used cars in Karachi after heavy rains.

settings.title: Clear Coat Damage
settings.description: Deep scratches and swirl marks in the clear coat become highly visible under UV light.

settings.title: Book Your Appointment
settings.description: Book online or WhatsApp us. Let us know your vehicle type so we allocate the right time slot.

settings.title: Arrive at Our Studio
settings.description: Drive into our Karachi studio. No prep needed — just park and hand over the keys.

settings.title: Studio Lights Go Off
settings.description: We close the shutters and darken the inspection bay so the UV light works accurately.

settings.title: Panel-by-Panel UV Scan
settings.description: Our technician moves the UV device systematically across every exterior panel — bonnet, doors, roof, bumpers, and boot.

settings.title: Findings Shown to You Live
settings.description: Every anomaly found is shown to you in real time. You see exactly what the UV reveals.

settings.title: Full Report Delivered
settings.description: Panel-by-panel findings summary on the spot. Written report available on request.
